summary: Iter29 e2e validation — Nav UX restructure (4 center links: Operate/Invest/Portfolio/Dashboard, RIGHT: Pricing + Enter VELA + Sign in) and CTA copy unification ('Analyze Acquisition' / 'Optimize Existing Asset') across Landing + INVEST module. ALL 11 spec items PASS. Backend regression 22/22 PASS in 3.5s. Desktop nav: 4 center testids confirmed (nav-operate→/dashboard/demo, nav-invest→/invest, nav-portfolio→/portfolio/demo, nav-dashboard→/dashboard/demo). Right side: nav-pricing→/pricing, nav-enter-vela-btn (→/invest), nav-login-btn. Header CSS position:sticky, top:0, z-index:50. Labels EXACTLY 'Operate / Invest / Portfolio / Dashboard / Pricing' — no 'VELA' prefix anywhere in nav. Landing hero: landing-cta-operate='Optimize Existing Asset' →/dashboard/demo (bronze), landing-cta-invest='Analyze Acquisition' →/invest (ghost). 'Analyze Property' string fully removed from Landing. Two Systems block: invest-cta='Analyze Acquisition', operate-cta='Optimize Existing Asset', INVEST tagline 'Analyze hospitality acquisitions using AI-powered investment intelligence.' present, OPERATE tagline 'Optimize existing hospitality assets through AI-powered operational intelligence.' present. /invest hero: invest-analyze-btn='Analyze Acquisition' (was 'Analyze Property'), subtitle starts 'Identify intelligent hospitality acquisitions through AI-powered underwriting and STR analysis…'. /invest/asset/demo footer: invest-footer-new-asset='Analyze another acquisition' (was 'asset'). /invest/portfolio: invest-portfolio-new-asset='Analyze new acquisition' (was 'asset'). Active-state coloring verified: on /, no center link active; on /invest, only Invest darkened; on /portfolio/demo, only Portfolio darkened; on /dashboard/demo, BOTH Operate AND Dashboard darkened (per spec). Mobile (390×844): desktop center+right links HIDDEN, nav-mobile-trigger visible with aria-label/aria-expanded toggling correctly, nav-mobile-panel covers viewport below header, all 7 mobile testids present (mobile-nav-operate/invest/portfolio/dashboard/pricing/enter-vela/sign-in). Panel auto-closes on link click (route change). Edit-Inputs regression on /invest/asset/demo: 149k→200k yields Smart Buy €184,000 — confirmed working. No new console errors introduced (only pre-existing 401s on protected resources during unauth browsing).
critical_code_review_comments: Nav.jsx CENTER_LINKS still has Operate AND Dashboard both pointing to /dashboard/demo (and /dashboard when authed). Spec confirms intentional, but two adjacent links to the same route causes duplicate active styling on /dashboard/* and may confuse users — consider merging or differentiating destinations once routing matures.

Nav.jsx hover behavior moved to static .nav-link-{light|dark}:hover rules in index.css (good fix vs iter28's broken Tailwind interpolation) — verify these CSS rules exist and apply correctly via DevTools next iteration.

InvestLanding.jsx still navigates the URL-paste flow to /invest/asset/draft via sessionStorage — works, but tightly couples the route to client-side state. If a user reloads /invest/asset/draft directly the page redirects to /invest. Consider a server-side draft id for robustness.
Landing.jsx is ~560 lines; SystemBlock/BeforeAfterFrame/PreviewTile inline components could move to /components/landing/ for clarity (carry-over from iter28).

Mobile panel uses position:fixed inset-0 top-16 — body scroll is NOT locked while open, so the page beneath can still scroll on touch devices. Add overflow-hidden to <body> when mobileOpen for polish.
test_credentials: n/a — all routes are public demos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://hospitality-ai-12.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend regression: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter25_invest.py /app/backend/tests/test_iter24_stripe_warmup.py — 22/22 in ~3.5s. NEW iter29 testids: NAV desktop nav-operate / nav-invest / nav-portfolio / nav-dashboard / nav-pricing / nav-enter-vela-btn / nav-login-btn (lowercase, no spaces — replaces iter28's nav-vela-invest etc.). NAV mobile nav-mobile-trigger / nav-mobile-panel + mobile-nav-{operate|invest|portfolio|dashboard|pricing|enter-vela|sign-in}. Mobile breakpoint = Tailwind md (768px); use 390×844 viewport for mobile assertions. All button text renders UPPERCASE via CSS — use case-insensitive comparisons or .lower() before assertion (button source is Title Case 'Analyze Acquisition' but rendered 'ANALYZE ACQUISITION'). Active link color = rgb(45,36,27) on parchment, rgb(240,229,208) on dark; inactive = rgb(107,93,74) parchment / rgb(163,154,136) dark. On /dashboard/* both Operate and Dashboard links go active simultaneously (intentional per spec). 401s in console on demo routes are pre-existing (auth-protected resources fetched while unauth) — not caused by iter29.
